name: Valentine's Day Basket with Ribbon Applique - Threshold™
description:
Get your home ready for the season of love with this Valentine Basket with Ribbon Applique from Threshold™. This V-Day basket is designed in a white hue and features beautiful red ribbon applique with "love" text for a sweet charm. Made of 100% recycled polyester, this round basket is ideal for storing throws, toys and much more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
